name: Race X: Car Racing Game | Car Games

reviews.review_description: So at the start of the tutorial you can’t even grab the steering wheel or use any controls so you sit there crashing in circles, I know that the game will be top charts soon though once they get their bugs together

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the kind words and honest feedback! We're aware of the control bug at the start and are working on a fix. Really appreciate your support — we’re excited to improve and get this game where it deserves to be!

— RaceX
